scope.purpose: Separate accepted direct Manipulation varieties from positive-only, rejected, and missing direct-evidence varieties without changing MainRegimeV2 price-root accounting.

coverage_matrix.evidence_summary: Public Telegram pump-attempt labels with same-source negative controls; multi-coin and multi-channel context; 542 unique positive coins and 209 channels.
coverage_matrix.gate_summary: accepted_95_true; calibration and test Wilson95 LCB >= 0.95; per-regime map records cal/test 0.999735 / 0.999701.
coverage_matrix.remaining_gap: Event-confirmed suppression/cooldown signal only; does not cover spoofing, layering, quote stuffing, or order-book behavior.

coverage_matrix.evidence_summary: Sparse Mehrnoom Twitter/social rows aligned to pump attempts with same-coin non-event controls.
coverage_matrix.gate_summary: blocked; best calibration/test Wilson95 LCB 0.937652 / 0.815594 for Twitter social gate, and 0.901875 / 0.881516 for raw social text gate.
coverage_matrix.remaining_gap: Needs stronger direct controls or a different text/event construction before acceptance.

coverage_matrix.evidence_summary: Zenodo DEX self-trade rows with explicit negative controls.
coverage_matrix.gate_summary: candidate_rows=22671; positive_self_trade_rows=12671; negative_control_rows=10000; calibration/test Wilson95 LCB 0.998671 / 0.998675; accepted direct Manipulation 95 true.
coverage_matrix.remaining_gap: Bounded DEX self-trade/wash-trade slice only; not spoofing/layering/quote stuffing.

coverage_matrix.evidence_summary: Consecutive stream readback of the same Zenodo DEX self-trade source.
coverage_matrix.gate_summary: rows_streamed=200000; positive_self_trade_rows=12671; negative_control_rows=187329; min calibration/test positive-or-negative Wilson95 LCB 0.979218; accepted 95 context slice.
coverage_matrix.remaining_gap: Confirms bounded self-trade context; still not full direct Manipulation variety coverage.

coverage_matrix.evidence_summary: Midsummer Dune wash-maker rows for a bounded same-token-day BSC slice with positive and negative controls.
coverage_matrix.gate_summary: positive_rows=1870; negative_control_rows=2994; minimum split/class Wilson95 LCB 0.995736; accepted gate accepted_95_bounded_bsc_meme_wash_maker_direct_slice.
coverage_matrix.remaining_gap: BSC wash-maker only; not centralized spoofing/layering/quote stuffing.

coverage_matrix.evidence_summary: Additional accepted Midsummer wash-maker slices across base, ethereum, and solana; BSC already ledgered.
coverage_matrix.gate_summary: new accepted platform count=3; accepted direct Manipulation rows added=5693; per-platform min LCBs base 0.98008, ethereum 0.967945, solana 0.998285.
coverage_matrix.remaining_gap: Direct on-chain wash-maker evidence only; full manipulation class remains incomplete.

coverage_matrix.evidence_summary: 204 positive direct regulator/enforcement cases from CFTC, CME Group, and ICE; tags include layering=116 and single_spoof_order=78.
coverage_matrix.gate_summary: accepted_95_direct_gate_added=0 because rows are case-level positives with no matched negative order-lifecycle/order-book controls.
coverage_matrix.remaining_gap: Acquire matched negative order-lifecycle/order-book rows before any spoofing/layering Wilson95 gate claim.

coverage_matrix.evidence_summary: Local spoofing repos had models/frameworks/synthetic injection logic but no replayable real timestamped positive/negative rows.
coverage_matrix.remaining_gap: Need exportable direct order-book/order-lifecycle rows with controls.

coverage_matrix.evidence_summary: No accepted timestamped order-message burst rows found in current artifacts.
coverage_matrix.remaining_gap: Acquire quote-message/order-book bursts and matched normal-period controls.

coverage_matrix.evidence_summary: No accepted pinging/order-probe rows found in current artifacts.
coverage_matrix.remaining_gap: Acquire order-lifecycle probe rows and matched controls.

coverage_matrix.evidence_summary: No accepted direct rows for bear raid or painting-the-tape variety found in current artifacts.
coverage_matrix.remaining_gap: Acquire direct event/order-flow rows and same-venue non-event controls.

next_action: Acquire matched negative order-lifecycle/order-book rows for spoofing/layering/quote-stuffing, then run one direct Manipulation calibration gate; do not run another OHLCV proxy scan.
